economic_notes: First Nation has investments in forestry (Island Falls Forestry LP), hydro-electric power (Coral Rapids Power Corporation - 1/3 interest in Peter Sutherland Sr. Generating Station LP), a smoked meat shop (Bussiere's Quality Meats), catering services (Weekashin Domco LP), and energy ventures (Kisis Aki Energy Inc., Yellow Falls Power LP). Agnico Eagle Mines Ltd. is a significant revenue partner. Drinking water settlement of $500,000 received September 21, 2022 (post fiscal year end). COVID-19 impacted operations with periodic closures and increased pandemic-specific funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) financial information not available for several limited partnerships and corporations (Pahquataskkahmekook LP, Yellow Falls LP, Kisis Aki Energy Inc., Transmission Infrastructure Partners Ltd.) making their classification under PSAS undeterminable; (2) comparative budget figures not presented as required by PSAS. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 but auditor's report is dated September 21, 2023 - over 17 months after year end. Nation is in Ontario not Alberta. ISC funding calculated as Fixed ($2,158,790) + Flexible ($208,041) + NFR Grant ($1,201,023) = $3,567,854. Total government transfers include ISC + CMHC + FNIHB + Mushkegowuk Council + NAN + OFNLP + Ontario Power Generation + Other provincial and federal revenue = approximately $9,531,264 but deferred revenue adjustments make precise allocation complex. expenses_infrastructure mapped to Community Services; expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development. Large new FNFA loan of ~$16.2M drawn during year for infrastructure. Drinking water settlement of $500,000 received post-year-end. Bussiere acquisition during year with purchase premium of $2,596,550 recorded.
